industry.description: Industry R&D, CAE, simulation, materials modeling, automotive, aerospace, nuclear, defense, and simulation software roles.

academic.description: Postdoc, research scientist, research associate, lecturer, university lab engineer, and academic research roles.

hybrid.description: National labs, government labs, applied research institutes, university-industry programs, and corporate research centers.

reject_or_low_priority: generic mechanical design with no simulation depth
pure project management with no technical modeling
roles below salary floor unless academic or strategically valuable
